title: Department Manager Vacancy at Zara India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Zara India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zara India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zara India:
Zara India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India!
